query: SELECT mr.id, mr.targetUserId, mr.type, mr.score, u.name FROM match_recommendations mr JOIN users u ON mr.targetUserId = u.id WHERE mr.userId = 1 ORDER BY mr.score DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qb4KWKvh9RF89Sy.ba0d13ba57ce --database DPWoTENtbqvfBEJqVPVTUM --execute SELECT mr.id, mr.targetUserId, mr.type, mr.score, u.name FROM match_recommendations mr JOIN users u ON mr.targetUserId = u.id WHERE mr.userId = 1 ORDER BY mr.score DESC;
